title: ALGOLOGY (Pain Application and Research Center)
content:
ALGOLOGY (Pain Application and Research Center)

By clicking on the headings below,

ALGOLOGY (Pain Application and Research Center)

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Related Faculties

Üsküdar University Pain (Algology) Application and Research Center entered into force with the approval of the Official Gazette dated July 7, 2020.

The center aims to coordinate scientific meetings and activities such as congresses, conferences, symposiums, panels, seminars, seminars, interviews, courses, exhibitions, commemoration days, to follow national and international projects for the establishment of strategic partnerships in the academic field and to support them for application, to help identify the projects needed by public and private institutions on the subject, to contribute to the sharing of university knowledge and experience by cooperating with centers, institutes and companies in Turkey and abroad.

Our center provides the relevant departments and programs at Üsküdar University with the opportunity to carry out the above-mentioned objectives in coordination and with wider opportunities, and supports the academic development of both faculty members and students in these programs.

It aims to work multidisciplinary in cooperation by guiding the academicians working in these fields by providing application unity between the programs to be carried out by the center. The clinical applications of the center on patients are carried out at Üsküdar University NP İSTANBUL Brain Hospital, while the research part of the center operates in Building A of Üsküdar University's Central Campus.
